headline: Humana (HUM) Is Up 9.6% After Raising 2025 EPS Outlook And Expanding CenterWell’s Whole-Person Care
summary: In April 2026, Humana reported stronger quarterly results, raised its 2025 EPS outlook, advanced operational efficiency and technology initiatives, expanded CenterWell and Medicaid, and announced governance, leadership, dividend, and ESOP-related share registration developments following its annual meeting. An interesting angle is CenterWell’s new Fulfillment Index, which aims to make older adults’ sense of purpose, connection, and security as trackable as traditional clinical measures,...
